title: Media and reagents for Seminavis robusta cultivation and experiments
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3q46v","text":"This protocol describes the culturing conditions used to grow S. robusta in the lab for all experiments.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":62,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"c8dvt","text":"It matters whether you use NanoPure/MilliQ water or glass distilled water. In glass distilled water-based media, S. robusta tends to disadhere from the bottom of the culture flask and float more readily than in MilliQ-based media.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":113,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Dissolve 34.5 g, Tropic-Marin Bioactif (TMB) in 1 L, MilliQ water
Dissolve 1 g, penicillin G sodium salt , 1 g, ampicillin sodium salt , 0.2 g, streptomycin sulfate , and 0.1 g, gentamycin sulfate in a final volume of 20 mL, F/2 medium .
After cooling, add 20 mL, 50x Guillard's supplement
Filter using Stericup into pre-sterilized bottles
Dissolve 17.25 g, TMB in 1 L, MilliQ
Add 0 µL 15 g, agar , dissolve while stirring and heating (may require boiling)
After cooling below 60 C, add 20 mL, 50x Guillard's supplement , as well as selective antibiotics, if desired.
Store in the dark at 4 C
1 Molarity (M), sorbitol in MilliQ, 0.77 Molarity (M), mannitol in MilliQ, or 0.77 Molarity (M), mannitol with 8 % volume, F/2 in MilliQ.
creator: Lev Tsypin
